productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Stan Smith 2 Tan Casual Shoes
description: A fantastic update of the iconic and beloved tennis classic of the brand, the Stan Smith II from adidas originals is a true dedication to the footwear legend. Introduced in 1965, this shoe has sold over 30 million pairs and is still a hot favourite - a huge reason why its a must have in your wardrobe.UpperFull grain leather upper with perforations on the midfoot for absolute breathable comfort and durabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHard back heel to lock the foot in placeMidsoleMesh insole for breathable comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with circular lugs for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
